name: codex-toys
description: Codex-native turn automation, toybox operation, SSH workspace orchestration, and dashboard proxy guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Run turn automation and operate Codex-native toyboxes.
interface.longDescription: codex-toys provides Codex guidance for plugin-native turn automation, local and SSH stdio toyboxes, optional dashboard proxy use, workspace delegation, and local MCP delegation tools. This plugin installs the Codex-facing guidance directly from the Git repository.
defaultPrompt: Author a turn automation script that can skip or start a Codex turn.
Check the local Codex workspace toybox.
Discover my Codex App remote connections and run codex-toys over SSH.
Run codex-toys against a remote Codex workspace over SSH.
Build a local dashboard proxy for a remote workspace over SSH.
